underlying_goal: Build and validate exhaustive DLP rule-engine test infrastructure (gen2_baseline), fix an engine NEAR-evaluator bug, and get the async transport verify path working at scale with reduced Redis polling and tuned worker concurrency
friction_detail: Async runs failed repeatedly due to XADD ID collisions with 16 workers and a flooded nsdlp queue causing mass timeouts, plus background shells running in the wrong working directory.
brief_summary: User wanted DLP tests passing and the async verify path working at scale; the sync/REST paths fully passed (7820/0) but the async path remained unresolved (mass timeouts) by transcript end, so the goal was only partially achieved.
